content.1: Character Force ~8 overall; peak skill in interpreting physical marks, symbols, and written or carved records (~9); weak spot in trust — she struggles to believe that other people's accounts of events are complete (~4).
content.2: She wants to examine and record the new marks scratched into the gather-stone before they are defaced or explained away — and beneath that, she wants to be the one who understands them first, before anyone else shapes the story.
content.3: Sable sits at the far end of the long trestle table with a piece of scraped hide in front of her on which she has already copied the marks she saw on the gather-stone from memory, her chalk moving in short certain strokes. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thousand-valleys:1
content._: Sable is a reader of marks and inscribed signs who travels between settlements at the edges of the drove-road network, called when new or unknown symbols appear in places that matter.
